12
Bake in minutes
12 pieces · ready in 25 min
So simple

From freezer to table,
in minutes.

No thawing, no fuss. Keep a bag in the freezer and you're three easy steps away from warm, golden Brazilian cheese bread.

  1. 1

    Keep it frozen

    Store in the freezer and bake straight from frozen — no thawing needed.

    Keep at 0°F (−18°C)
  2. 2

    Bake or air fry

    Pop them in the oven or air fryer until puffed and golden brown.

    350°F · 20–30 min
  3. 3

    Enjoy warm

    Crisp outside, soft and pillowy inside — perfect with coffee, any time of day.

    Best shared
Oven· 350°F · 25–30 min Air fryer· 350°F · 20–25 min

matters.

Real ingredients, thoughtfully chosen. No fillers, no artificial preservatives — just the simple, nourishing things that make comfort food worth sharing.

Our Story

It started at a
Brazilian table.

"The best food doesn't need a complicated list of ingredients — just real ones, and people to share it with."

Growing up in Brazil, pão de queijo meant warmth — slow mornings, family gathered close, something made with care. When we moved to the States, that comfort was hard to find without a label full of words we couldn't pronounce.

So we made it ourselves: the same golden, naturally gluten-free cheese bread, with real, recognizable ingredients — grass-fed cheese, organic eggs, and bone broth. Small-batch, woman-owned, and made the way we remember it.

Woman-owned Small-batch Clean ingredients Naturally gluten-free
With love,The LIVV BITES family
